所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

O

openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.CreateAccountPage
Opens and initializes the create account page interface.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.CreateTaskPage
Opens and initializes the create task page interface.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.DeliverTaskPage
Opens and initializes the Deliver Task page interface.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.DetailPage
Opens the detail page containing the account information and interaction buttons.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.GetTaskPage
Loads tasks from files into the task list.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.GoalPage
Opens the goal page with all UI components configured.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.homeGUI
Opens the home page interface and initializes all GUI components including buttons, labels, and navigation controls.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.homePageForKid
Opens the home page interface, initializes GUI components including navigation buttons, and sets up event listeners for user interaction.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.homePageForParent
Opens the home page interface, initializes GUI components including navigation buttons, and sets up event listeners for user interaction.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.ModifyPage
Opens the Modify Task page, sets up the GUI components including text fields and buttons for task modification and deletion, and handles the actions performed on these components.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.NotificationPage
Opens the notification page.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.Page
Open page.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.ProfilePageForKid
Opens the profile page for the kid user.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.ProfilePageForParent
Opens the profile page for the parent user.
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.SetTaskPage
 
openPage() - 类中的方法 Page.SubmitPage
Opens the set task page.
